sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n58655" key="kolobotra/xhlos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κολοβοτράχηλος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, <sense id="n58655.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">stump-necked</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Adam.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.21</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
